summary: David, what a week you've had! You've now lost 60.8 pounds from your starting weight—that's a major milestone and a testament to your commitment with Mounjaro and consistent logging. Your recent pace of 3.1 pounds per week over the last two weeks shows real momentum, and hitting 254.2 pounds means you're well into your journey with measurable progress. Next week, let's focus on keeping that logging streak going strong since you've captured 12 days so far—consistency with your Dexcom and Garmin data is what's fueling these results. You're doing the work that matters most, and your body is responding beautifully.
